key_insight: A pretrained ANN encoder can be paired with a locally trained SNN classifier to deliver near state-of-the-art accuracy without end-to-end backpropagation.
engineering_relevance: This hybrid ANN-SNN design offers a biologically plausible path to efficient downstream classification in computational modeling workflows where pretrained feature extractors are available.
method: Use a pretrained EfficientNet as the feature encoder.
Convert encoder activations into spike trains using rate coding.
Train the CoLaNET spiking classifier with local plasticity rules instead of global gradients.
evidence_signal: The pipeline achieved 99.09% accuracy on a 64-class ImageNet benchmark, indicating strong performance in evaluation from the abstract.
watch_item: The approach depends on a pretrained encoder and rate-coding conversion, so performance and efficiency may be sensitive to encoding choices and task transferability.
paper_title: Hybrid ANN-SNN Pipeline with Local Plasticity
